name: Formosa International Hotels Corporation
summary: Formosa International Hotels Corporation operates in the hotel industry in Taiwan and internationally. It owns and manages Regent Hotels & Resorts, an international luxury hotel brand; Silks Place, a lifestyle hotel brand; and Just Sleep, an affordable business hotel chain. The company operates 18 hotels with 3,849 rooms and suites. It also operates restaurants in National Palace Museum and various other renowned attractions in Taiwan, as well as operates Domino's Pizza chain in Taiwan. The company was founded in 1991 and is based in Taipei City, Taiwan.
